usable_ratio_profiles.provenance: Cavigelli et al. 2019 EBPC reports AlexNet average compression ratio of 5.1x in the local text extraction at review-stage/ebpc_2019.txt.
Cavigelli et al. 2019 EBPC reports VGG-16 average compression ratio of 4.0x in the local text extraction at review-stage/ebpc_2019.txt.
Cavigelli et al. 2019 EBPC reports ResNet-34 average compression ratio of 2.4x in the local text extraction at review-stage/ebpc_2019.txt.
Quad Length Codes reports 13.9% compressibility for e4m3 in the local literature summary; ratio is derived as 1/(1-0.139).
ZipServ is summarized locally as up to 30% model-size reduction; ratio is derived as 1/(1-0.30).

deferred_sources.reason: The local artifact records NetZIP as the direct competitor and reports training-time benefit, but no public payload trace or per-payload byte ratio was found. It must remain a literature positioning note until an artifact or explicit ratio table is available.
